problem id: f84c009a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(5) XOR NOT SHL(7)) AND ROT(5)

examples:
  11101011 -> 00011101
  11001001 -> 00011001
  01100100 -> 00001100
  01000111 -> 10001000
  10110100 -> 00010110
  10010110 -> 00010010
  01011111 -> 10001011
  01111110 -> 00001111
  01000100 -> 00001000
  10001001 -> 00010001

query: 11001000
predicted answer: 00011001
